item.title: Automated Optical Inspection Market Size, Share, Growth, 2034 - Straits Research
item.description: A detailed report on the growing market size and share of commercial Automated Optical Inspection systems up to 2034.

item.title: Annual Industrial Robot Shipments ‘Will Reach More Than 760k Units in 2030’
item.description: Market trends predict massive commercial growth for industrial robot shipments driving automated quality inspection solutions by 2030.

item.title: Portable Optical Inspection System Built for High-Volume CNC Production
item.description: A new portable optical inspection system provides scalable solutions for high-volume CNC manufacturing environments.

item.title: SiLC's Eyeonic Vista: Advanced Silicon Photonics for Enhanced Security and Sensing
item.description: SiLC announces new silicon photonics developments enhancing advanced sensor hardware for next-gen machine vision sensing.

item.title: Pleora, imavix engineering GEV-Stream End-to-End GigE Vision 3.0 Streaming Solution
item.description: Pleora and imavix release a new GigE Vision 3.0 streaming solution, expanding hardware options for industrial machine vision applications.

item.title: Three Days, Three Keynotes: Trends and Insights from Automate 2026 in Chicago, June 22-25
item.description: Keynotes and trends from Automate 2026 highlight the latest commercial developments in machine vision and factory automation.

item.title: AI in the Quality Department: A Practical Path Forward for Small Manufacturers
item.description: A practical guide for small manufacturers adopting AI-driven quality inspection and defect detection solutions.
